overall.description: Cinematic game footage of a gothic great hall with floating candles illuminating long dining tables filled with students. Two robed figures walk slowly through the foreground while others dine below. High-quality Unreal Engine 5 rendering with dramatic candlelight and moonlight through tall stained-glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candle illumination

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the great hall, observing the dining students and the two robed figures walking ahead

notable_agents.action: two robed figures walking slowly from left to right across the foreground

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating magically in the air, providing warm illumination throughout the hall
long wooden dining tables arranged in rows, covered with tableware and food
tall arched stained-glass windows showing night sky with clouds
massive stone gothic arches supporting the high vaulted ceiling
large stone fireplace with warm fire glowing on the left wall
elevated stone balcony with ornate railing on the left side of the hall

segments.scene_description: A cinematic view of a gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Two robed figures walk slowly across the foreground while students dine at long wooden tables below. Tall stained-glass windows reveal a cloudy night sky outside, and a large fireplace burns warmly on the left wall. The camera slowly pans across the scene, capturing the magical atmosphere of the dining hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, cinematic pan across a gothic great hall that captures the magical interplay between warm interior light and a cold night sky. It begins by focusing on the atmospheric glow of hundreds of floating candles that illuminate students dining at long wooden tables. As the camera glides across the space, the view passes two robed figures walking slowly through the foreground, drawing attention to the scale of the architecture. The scene then expands to reveal a large, warmly burning fireplace on the left wall before shifting toward tall stained-glass windows that look out onto a cloudy night.
